name: Color Picker
description: Pick colors, convert HEX, RGB, HSL. Generate color palettes. Free online color tool.
keywords: color picker, hex color, rgb color, hsl color, color converter, pick color online
howToUse: 1. Use color slider or enter HEX/RGB/HSL 2. See color preview 3. Click any format to copy
faq: Q: What formats? A: HEX, RGB, HSL, CMYK. Q: Can I generate palette? A: Yes, random palette.
